-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I just noticed that there is a patch files/patch-udcli-udcli.c in the
ports tree which I didn't have in my local repository. That patch fails
to apply, so please remove it.

The patch was supposed to fix the port for 4.x, I cannot test whether
the updated port compiles properly on 4.x, though. Any help with that
would be appreciated.
